citations.quote: Rent: £4,686.18 Total Rent (including £500 Advance Rent Payment) £28.23 Per Day
The subsequent monthly sums due will be shown on the rent schedule to be provided separately to the Tenant.

findings.text: The tenancy agreement states total rent of £4,686.18 including a £500 advance payment, with a daily rate of £28.23.
The agreement provides that subsequent monthly sums will be shown on a separate rent schedule.
The tenancy period is from 13 March 2026 to 25 August 2026.
No rent schedule or payment records were found in the provided source materials.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search for the rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) of the tenancy agreement (NAP-SRC-0010) and any payment records for Miss Anfal Elbushra. Check for additional sources such as correspondence, account statements, or internal records.
proposed_tasks.title: Locate rent schedule and payment records for Miss Anfal Elbushra

summary: Reviewed the student licence agreement (NAP-SRC-0010) for Miss Anfal Elbushra. The agreement states a total rent of £4,686.18 including a £500 advance payment, with subsequent monthly instalments to be shown on a separate rent schedule. No rent schedule or payment records were found in the provided source materials. A follow-up task is proposed to locate the rent schedule and payment records.

uncertainties.text: The rent schedule and payment records for Miss Anfal Elbushra are not present in the provided source materials.
